exhibits.name: Standard Franchise Agreement and Related Materials
exhibits.notes: Franchise Agreement (~70 pages) plus Attachment 1 (Territory), Attachment 2 (Equipment/Supply Package), Attachment 2b (Fee Schedule), Guaranty Agreement, Non-compete/Confidentiality agreements

exhibits.name: State Addenda
exhibits.notes: 9 states with FDD addenda and/or franchise agreement riders. Each state may have both a disclosure document addendum and a franchise agreement rider.

exhibits.name: List of Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Franchisees who ceased to do business, terminated, canceled, not renewed, or transferred in last fiscal year. Includes mutual cancellations.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements of Franchisor
exhibits.notes: Scanned images (no text layer). Includes balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and notes to financial statements (10 pages of notes). Financial report cover by Mauldin & Jenkins.

exhibits.name: Confidentiality Agreement for Prospective Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Pre-purchase confidentiality agreement for reviewing Operations Manual

exhibits.name: Guarantee Agreement
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty required from all owners of business entity franchisee. Includes waiver of punitive damages, waiver of class actions. Georgia law governs.

exhibits.name: Sample General Release
exhibits.notes: Two forms: (1) Mutual General Release of Claims for cessation, (2) Grant of Franchisor Consent and General Release for transfers/renewals. Georgia law, Cobb County venue.

exhibits.name: Prospective Franchisee Non-Disclosure Agreement
exhibits.notes: NDA for prospective franchisees. NOTE: Item 22 refers to this as 'SBA Addendum' but exhibit cover and listing say 'Prospective Franchise Non-Disclosure Agreement' — naming discrepancy.

exhibits.name: Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: State registration/filing effective dates for 14 states

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two copies — one for franchisee, one to return to franchisor
